name: jsonlcheck
one_liner: Strict streaming JSONL validator with line:column diagnostics; pure stdlib; CLI + library.
problem: Existing JSON tooling silently swallows JSONL defects that corrupt LLM training sets and eval logs: NaN/Infinity literals, duplicate object keys, BOMs, unescaped control characters, blank lines, missing trailing newlines. Surfacing these per-line with line:column is the missing primitive.
